ActionCategories.Title: Network Issues
ActionCategories.Description: Fix common internet and network problems

Actions.Name: Fix Internet Connection
Actions.Description: Clear DNS cache and reset network
Actions.Script: Clear-DnsClientCache; Write-Output 'DNS cache cleared'; $ping = Test-Connection 8.8.8.8 -Count 1 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($ping) { Write-Output 'Internet: Connected' } else { Write-Output 'Internet: Still not working - contact IT' }

Actions.Name: Check Network Status
Actions.Script: $ping = Test-Connection 8.8.8.8 -Count 2 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($ping) { $ms = [math]::Round(($ping | Measure-Object ResponseTime -Average).Average); Write-Output "Internet: Working (${ms}ms)" } else { Write-Output 'Internet: NOT CONNECTED' }; Write-Output ''; Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object { $_.IPAddress -ne '127.0.0.1' } | Select-Object -First 1 | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "Your IP: $($_.IPAddress)" }

Actions.Name: Renew IP Address
Actions.Description: Get a new IP address from DHCP
Actions.Script: ipconfig /release | Out-Null; Start-Sleep 2; ipconfig /renew | Out-Null; Start-Sleep 3; Write-Output 'IP address renewed'; Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object { $_.IPAddress -ne '127.0.0.1' } | Select-Object -First 1 | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "New IP: $($_.IPAddress)" }

Actions.Name: Check Printer Status
Actions.Description: See if print service is running
Actions.Script: $s = Get-Service Spooler; Write-Output "Print Service: $($s.Status)"; Write-Output ''; Write-Output 'Your printers:'; Get-Printer | Select-Object -First 5 | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "- $($_.Name)" }

Actions.Name: Fix Print Spooler
Actions.Description: Restart print service to fix stuck jobs
Actions.Script: Stop-Service Spooler -Force; Start-Sleep 2; Remove-Item "$env:SystemRoot\System32\spool\PRINTERS\*" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Service Spooler; Start-Sleep 2; Write-Output "Print Service: $((Get-Service Spooler).Status)"; Write-Output 'Print queue cleared'

Actions.Name: Clear Print Queue
Actions.Script: Get-PrintJob | Remove-PrintJob -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output 'Print queue cleared'

Actions.Name: Check Why PC is Slow
Actions.Script: $os = Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem; $mem = [math]::Round(($os.TotalVisibleMemorySize - $os.FreePhysicalMemory) / $os.TotalVisibleMemorySize * 100); Write-Output "Memory Usage: ${mem}%"; if ($mem -gt 80) { Write-Output '⚠ Memory is high!' }; Write-Output ''; Write-Output 'Top memory users:'; Get-Process | Sort-Object WorkingSet64 -Descending | Select-Object -First 5 | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "- $($_.ProcessName): $([math]::Round($_.WorkingSet64/1MB))MB" }

Actions.Name: Clear Temporary Files
Actions.Description: Free up disk space by clearing temp files
Actions.Script: $before = [math]::Round((Get-ChildItem $env:TEMP -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum).Sum/1MB,1); Remove-Item "$env:TEMP\*" -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $after = [math]::Round((Get-ChildItem $env:TEMP -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum).Sum/1MB,1); Write-Output "Freed: $([math]::Round($before-$after,1)) MB"

Actions.Name: Check Disk Space
Actions.Description: See how much space you have left
Actions.Script: $d = Get-PSDrive C; $free = [math]::Round($d.Free/1GB,1); $total = [math]::Round(($d.Used+$d.Free)/1GB,1); $pct = [math]::Round($d.Free/($d.Used+$d.Free)*100); Write-Output "Disk Space: ${free}GB free of ${total}GB"; if ($pct -lt 10) { Write-Output '⚠ Disk space is low!' } else { Write-Output '✓ Disk space OK' }

Actions.Name: Refresh Desktop
Actions.Description: Fix frozen taskbar or desktop icons
Actions.Script: Stop-Process -Name explorer -Force; Start-Sleep 2; Start-Process explorer; Write-Output 'Desktop refreshed'

Actions.Name: Fix Microsoft Teams
Actions.Description: Clear Teams cache to fix issues
Actions.Script: $teams = Get-Process Teams -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($teams) { Stop-Process -Name Teams -Force; Start-Sleep 2 }; Remove-Item "$env:APPDATA\Microsoft\Teams\Cache\*" -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item "$env:APPDATA\Microsoft\Teams\blob_storage\*" -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output 'Teams cache cleared'; Write-Output 'Please restart Teams'

Actions.Name: Fix Outlook Slowness
Actions.Script: $outlook = Get-Process OUTLOOK -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($outlook) { Write-Output 'Please close Outlook first' } else { Remove-Item "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\Microsoft\Outlook\RoamCache\*" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output 'Outlook cache cleared' }

Actions.Name: Clear Browser Cache
Actions.Script: $edge = Get-Process msedge -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($edge) { Write-Output 'Please close Edge browser first' } else { Remove-Item "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\Microsoft\Edge\User Data\Default\Cache\*" -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output 'Edge cache cleared' }

Actions.Name: My Computer Info
Actions.Description: See your computer name and user
Actions.Script: Write-Output "Computer: $env:COMPUTERNAME"; Write-Output "User: $env:USERNAME"; Write-Output "Domain: $env:USERDOMAIN"

Actions.Name: Time Since Restart
Actions.Description: Check when your PC was last restarted
Actions.Script: $boot = (Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem).LastBootUpTime; $up = (Get-Date) - $boot; Write-Output "Last restart: $($boot.ToString('MMM dd, yyyy HH:mm'))"; Write-Output "Running for: $($up.Days) days, $($up.Hours) hours"; if ($up.Days -gt 7) { Write-Output ''; Write-Output '⚠ Consider restarting your PC' }

Actions.Name: Check for IT Support
Actions.Description: Get info to share with IT helpdesk
Actions.Script: Write-Output '=== Info for IT Support ==='; Write-Output "Computer: $env:COMPUTERNAME"; Write-Output "User: $env:USERDOMAIN\$env:USERNAME"; $os = Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem; Write-Output "OS: $($os.Caption)"; Write-Output "Build: $($os.BuildNumber)"; Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object { $_.IPAddress -ne '127.0.0.1' } | Select-Object -First 1 | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "IP: $($_.IPAddress)" }

Actions.Name: Check SCCM Status
Actions.Description: See if SCCM client is running
Actions.Script: $s = Get-Service CcmExec -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($s) { Write-Output "SCCM Service: $($s.Status)"; Write-Output "Start Type: $($s.StartType)" } else { Write-Output 'SCCM Client: Not installed' }

Actions.Name: Check SCCM Cache
Actions.Script: $path = 'C:\Windows\ccmcache'; if (Test-Path $path) { $size = [math]::Round((Get-ChildItem $path -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum).Sum/1MB,1); Write-Output "SCCM Cache: ${size} MB" } else { Write-Output 'SCCM cache folder not found' }

Actions.Name: Check Recent SCCM Logs
Actions.Script: $logPath = 'C:\Windows\CCM\Logs'; if (Test-Path $logPath) { Get-ChildItem $logPath -Filter '*.log' | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 5 | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "$($_.Name): $($_.LastWriteTime.ToString('MM/dd HH:mm'))" } } else { Write-Output 'SCCM logs not found' }

Actions.Name: Restart SCCM Service
Actions.Script: $s = Get-Service CcmExec -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($s) { Restart-Service CcmExec -Force; Start-Sleep 3; Write-Output "SCCM Service: $((Get-Service CcmExec).Status)" } else { Write-Output 'SCCM not installed' }

Actions.Name: Check Antivirus Status
Actions.Script: $status = Get-MpComputerStatus -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($status) { Write-Output "Real-time Protection: $(if($status.RealTimeProtectionEnabled){'Enabled ✓'}else{'DISABLED ⚠'})"; Write-Output "Antivirus Enabled: $(if($status.AntivirusEnabled){'Yes ✓'}else{'NO ⚠'})"; Write-Output "Last Scan: $($status.QuickScanEndTime.ToString('MMM dd, yyyy HH:mm'))"; Write-Output "Definitions: $($status.AntivirusSignatureLastUpdated.ToString('MMM dd, yyyy'))" } else { Write-Output 'Unable to check Windows Defender status' }

Actions.Name: Check Firewall Status
Actions.Script: $profiles = Get-NetFirewallProfile; foreach ($p in $profiles) { $status = if($p.Enabled){'ON ✓'}else{'OFF ⚠'}; Write-Output "$($p.Name) Profile: $status" }

Actions.Name: Check BitLocker Status
Actions.Script: $bl = Get-BitLockerVolume -MountPoint 'C:' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($bl) { Write-Output "C: Drive Encryption: $($bl.ProtectionStatus)"; Write-Output "Encryption Method: $($bl.EncryptionMethod)"; Write-Output "Lock Status: $($bl.LockStatus)" } else { Write-Output 'BitLocker status unavailable' }

Actions.Name: Run Quick Virus Scan
Actions.Script: Write-Output 'Starting quick scan...'; Start-MpScan -ScanType QuickScan -AsJob | Out-Null; Write-Output 'Quick scan started in background'; Write-Output 'Check Windows Security for results'

Actions.Name: Update Virus Definitions
Actions.Script: Write-Output 'Updating virus definitions...'; Update-MpSignature -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $status = Get-MpComputerStatus; Write-Output "Definitions updated: $($status.AntivirusSignatureLastUpdated.ToString('MMM dd, yyyy HH:mm'))"

Actions.Name: List Installed Applications
Actions.Script: Write-Output 'Installed Applications:'; Write-Output ''; Get-ItemProperty HKLM:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Uninstall\* | Where-Object { $_.DisplayName } | Sort-Object DisplayName | Select-Object -First 25 | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "- $($_.DisplayName) ($($_.DisplayVersion))" }; Write-Output ''; Write-Output '(Showing first 25 apps)'

Actions.Name: Check Microsoft Office
Actions.Script: $office = Get-ItemProperty 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Office\ClickToRun\Configuration' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($office) { Write-Output "Office Version: $($office.VersionToReport)"; Write-Output "Channel: $($office.CDNBaseUrl -replace '.*/', '')"; Write-Output "Platform: $($office.Platform)" } else { Write-Output 'Microsoft 365/Office Click-to-Run not found'; Write-Output 'Checking MSI version...'; $msi = Get-ItemProperty 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Office\*\Common\InstallRoot' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($msi) { Write-Output 'MSI-based Office detected' } else { Write-Output 'Office not detected' } }

Actions.Name: Check Java Version
Actions.Script: $java = Get-ItemProperty 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\JavaSoft\Java Runtime Environment' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($java) { Write-Output "Java Version: $($java.CurrentVersion)" } else { $javacmd = Get-Command java -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($javacmd) { $ver = java -version 2>&1 | Select-String 'version'; Write-Output $ver } else { Write-Output 'Java not installed' } }

Actions.Name: Check .NET Versions
Actions.Script: Write-Output '.NET Framework:'; Get-ChildItem 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\NET Framework Setup\NDP\v4\Full\' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Get-ItemProperty | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "  v$($_.Release) (4.x)" }; Write-Output ''; Write-Output '.NET Core/5+:'; dotnet --list-runtimes 2>$null | Select-Object -First 5 | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "  $_" }

Actions.Name: Repair Microsoft Office
Actions.Script: $clickToRun = 'C:\Program Files\Common Files\Microsoft Shared\ClickToRun\OfficeClickToRun.exe'; if (Test-Path $clickToRun) { Write-Output 'Starting Office repair...'; Start-Process $clickToRun -ArgumentList 'scenario=Repair platform=x64 culture=en-us RepairType=QuickRepair DisplayLevel=False' -Wait; Write-Output 'Office repair initiated' } else { Write-Output 'Office Click-to-Run not found' }

ActionCategories.Title: User Account
ActionCategories.Description: Check user account and profile info

Actions.Name: Check Password Expiry
Actions.Script: Write-Output "User: $env:USERDOMAIN\$env:USERNAME"; Write-Output ''; try { $user = ([adsisearcher]"(&(objectCategory=User)(samAccountName=$env:USERNAME))").FindOne(); if ($user) { $pwdSet = [datetime]::FromFileTime([int64]$user.Properties['pwdlastset'][0]); Write-Output "Password set: $($pwdSet.ToString('MMM dd, yyyy'))"; $maxPwd = ([adsisearcher]'(objectClass=domain)').FindOne().Properties['maxpwdage'][0]; $maxDays = [math]::Abs($maxPwd / 864000000000); $expires = $pwdSet.AddDays($maxDays); $left = ($expires - (Get-Date)).Days; Write-Output "Expires: $($expires.ToString('MMM dd, yyyy')) ($left days)"; if ($left -lt 14) { Write-Output '⚠ Expiring soon!' } } else { Write-Output 'User not found in AD' } } catch { Write-Output 'Domain unavailable - using local info'; Write-Output "Computer: $env:COMPUTERNAME" }

Actions.Name: My Group Memberships
Actions.Description: See which groups you belong to
Actions.Script: Write-Output "User: $env:USERDOMAIN\$env:USERNAME"; Write-Output ''; Write-Output 'Group Memberships:'; whoami /groups /fo table | Select-Object -Skip 1 | Select-Object -First 15

Actions.Name: Check Profile Size
Actions.Description: See your user profile disk usage
Actions.Script: $profile = $env:USERPROFILE; $size = [math]::Round((Get-ChildItem $profile -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum).Sum/1GB,2); Write-Output "Profile Location: $profile"; Write-Output "Total Size: ${size} GB"; Write-Output ''; Write-Output 'Largest folders:'; Get-ChildItem $profile -Directory | ForEach-Object { $s = [math]::Round((Get-ChildItem $_.FullName -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum).Sum/1MB); [PSCustomObject]@{Name=$_.Name;SizeMB=$s} } | Sort-Object SizeMB -Descending | Select-Object -First 5 | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "  $($_.Name): $($_.SizeMB) MB" }

Actions.Name: Lock Workstation
Actions.Script: rundll32.exe user32.dll,LockWorkStation; Write-Output 'Workstation locked'

Actions.Name: Check Pending Updates
Actions.Description: See if updates are waiting to install
Actions.Script: $session = New-Object -ComObject Microsoft.Update.Session; $searcher = $session.CreateUpdateSearcher(); try { $pending = $searcher.Search('IsInstalled=0'); Write-Output "Pending Updates: $($pending.Updates.Count)"; if ($pending.Updates.Count -gt 0) { Write-Output ''; $pending.Updates | Select-Object -First 5 | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "- $($_.Title)" } } else { Write-Output '✓ System is up to date' } } catch { Write-Output 'Unable to check for updates' }

Actions.Name: Recent Update History
Actions.Script: $session = New-Object -ComObject Microsoft.Update.Session; $searcher = $session.CreateUpdateSearcher(); $history = $searcher.QueryHistory(0,10); Write-Output 'Recent Updates:'; Write-Output ''; foreach ($h in $history) { $status = switch($h.ResultCode) { 2 {'✓'} 4 {'⚠Failed'} default {''} }; Write-Output "$($h.Date.ToString('MM/dd/yy')) $status $($h.Title.Substring(0,[Math]::Min(50,$h.Title.Length)))..." }

Actions.Name: Last Update Check
Actions.Description: When Windows last checked for updates
Actions.Script: $au = (New-Object -ComObject Microsoft.Update.AutoUpdate); Write-Output "Last Check: $($au.Results.LastSearchSuccessDate)"; Write-Output "Last Install: $($au.Results.LastInstallationSuccessDate)"

Actions.Name: Check for Updates Now
Actions.Script: Write-Output 'Starting Windows Update check...'; (New-Object -ComObject Microsoft.Update.AutoUpdate).DetectNow(); Write-Output 'Update check initiated'; Write-Output 'Check Windows Update settings for results'

Actions.Name: Check Restart Required
Actions.Description: See if a restart is needed for updates
Actions.Script: $reboot = Test-Path 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\WindowsUpdate\Auto Update\RebootRequired'; $pending = Test-Path 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Component Based Servicing\RebootPending'; if ($reboot -or $pending) { Write-Output '⚠ RESTART REQUIRED'; Write-Output 'Please restart your computer to complete updates' } else { Write-Output '✓ No restart required' }

Actions.Name: Recent System Errors
Actions.Script: Write-Output 'Recent System Errors (last 24h):'; Write-Output ''; Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='System';Level=2;StartTime=(Get-Date).AddDays(-1)} -MaxEvents 10 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "$($_.TimeCreated.ToString('MM/dd HH:mm')) - $($_.ProviderName): $($_.Message.Substring(0,[Math]::Min(60,$_.Message.Length)))..." }; if (-not $?) { Write-Output 'No critical errors in last 24 hours ✓' }

Actions.Name: Application Crashes
Actions.Script: Write-Output 'Recent Application Errors:'; Write-Output ''; Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='Application';Level=2;StartTime=(Get-Date).AddDays(-7)} -MaxEvents 10 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "$($_.TimeCreated.ToString('MM/dd HH:mm')) - $($_.ProviderName)" }; if (-not $?) { Write-Output 'No application errors in last 7 days ✓' }

Actions.Name: Check for Blue Screens
Actions.Script: $dumps = Get-ChildItem 'C:\Windows\Minidump' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($dumps) { Write-Output "⚠ Found $($dumps.Count) crash dump(s):"; Write-Output ''; $dumps | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 5 | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "  $($_.Name) - $($_.LastWriteTime.ToString('MMM dd, yyyy HH:mm'))" } } else { Write-Output '✓ No recent blue screen crashes found' }

Actions.Name: Recent Logins
Actions.Script: Write-Output 'Recent Login Events:'; Write-Output ''; Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='Security';Id=4624;StartTime=(Get-Date).AddDays(-1)} -MaxEvents 10 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Properties[5].Value -notmatch '^(SYSTEM|NETWORK|LOCAL)' } | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "$($_.TimeCreated.ToString('MM/dd HH:mm')) - $($_.Properties[5].Value)" }

ActionCategories.Title: Remote Access & VPN
ActionCategories.Description: Check VPN and remote desktop status

Actions.Name: Check VPN Connection
Actions.Script: $vpn = Get-VpnConnection -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($vpn) { foreach ($v in $vpn) { Write-Output "VPN: $($v.Name)"; Write-Output "Status: $($v.ConnectionStatus)"; Write-Output "Server: $($v.ServerAddress)"; Write-Output '' } } else { Write-Output 'No VPN connections configured'; Write-Output ''; Write-Output 'Checking RAS connections...'; rasdial | Select-Object -First 5 }

Actions.Name: Check Remote Desktop
Actions.Script: $rdp = Get-ItemProperty 'HKLM:\System\CurrentControlSet\Control\Terminal Server' -Name fDenyTSConnections -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($rdp.fDenyTSConnections -eq 0) { Write-Output 'Remote Desktop: Enabled ✓' } else { Write-Output 'Remote Desktop: Disabled' }; $fw = Get-NetFirewallRule -DisplayGroup 'Remote Desktop' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Enabled -eq 'True' }; if ($fw) { Write-Output 'Firewall Rule: Enabled ✓' } else { Write-Output 'Firewall Rule: Not configured' }

Actions.Name: Active Network Connections
Actions.Script: Write-Output 'Active Connections:'; Write-Output ''; Get-NetTCPConnection -State Established | Select-Object -First 15 | ForEach-Object { $proc = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "$($_.RemoteAddress):$($_.RemotePort) - $($proc.ProcessName)" }

Actions.Name: WiFi Networks
Actions.Script: Write-Output 'Saved WiFi Networks:'; Write-Output ''; netsh wlan show profiles | Select-String 'All User Profile' | ForEach-Object { $name = ($_ -split ':')[1].Trim(); Write-Output "- $name" }

Actions.Name: Show Current WiFi Password
Actions.Script: $wifi = (netsh wlan show interfaces | Select-String 'SSID' | Select-Object -First 1) -replace '.*: ',''; if ($wifi) { Write-Output "Connected to: $wifi"; Write-Output ''; $key = netsh wlan show profile name="$wifi" key=clear | Select-String 'Key Content'; if ($key) { Write-Output "Password: $(($key -split ':')[1].Trim())" } else { Write-Output 'Password not available' } } else { Write-Output 'Not connected to WiFi' }

Actions.Name: System Specifications
Actions.Script: $cs = Get-CimInstance Win32_ComputerSystem; $os = Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem; $cpu = Get-CimInstance Win32_Processor; Write-Output "Model: $($cs.Manufacturer) $($cs.Model)"; Write-Output "CPU: $($cpu.Name)"; Write-Output "RAM: $([math]::Round($cs.TotalPhysicalMemory/1GB)) GB"; Write-Output "OS: $($os.Caption)"; Write-Output "Build: $($os.BuildNumber)"

Actions.Name: Check Disk Health
Actions.Script: Get-PhysicalDisk | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "Drive: $($_.FriendlyName)"; Write-Output "Status: $($_.HealthStatus)"; Write-Output "Size: $([math]::Round($_.Size/1GB)) GB"; Write-Output "Media: $($_.MediaType)"; Write-Output '' }

Actions.Name: Battery Status
Actions.Script: $battery = Get-CimInstance Win32_Battery -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($battery) { Write-Output "Battery Level: $($battery.EstimatedChargeRemaining)%"; Write-Output "Status: $($battery.BatteryStatus)"; $report = powercfg /batteryreport /output "$env:TEMP\battery.html" 2>&1; if (Test-Path "$env:TEMP\battery.html") { Write-Output ''; Write-Output 'Detailed report saved to temp folder' } } else { Write-Output 'No battery detected (desktop PC)' }

Actions.Name: Device Problems
Actions.Script: Write-Output 'Devices with Problems:'; Write-Output ''; $problems = Get-CimInstance Win32_PnPEntity | Where-Object { $_.ConfigManagerErrorCode -ne 0 }; if ($problems) { $problems | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "⚠ $($_.Name): Error $($_.ConfigManagerErrorCode)" } } else { Write-Output '✓ All devices working properly' }

Actions.Name: Display Information
Actions.Script: Get-CimInstance Win32_DesktopMonitor | Where-Object { $_.Status -eq 'OK' } | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "Monitor: $($_.Name)"; Write-Output "Screen: $($_.ScreenWidth) x $($_.ScreenHeight)"; Write-Output '' }; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; [System.Windows.Forms.Screen]::AllScreens | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "Display: $($_.DeviceName)"; Write-Output "Resolution: $($_.Bounds.Width) x $($_.Bounds.Height)"; Write-Output "Primary: $($_.Primary)"; Write-Output '' }

Actions.Name: Check Critical Services
Actions.Script: $services = @('wuauserv','BITS','CryptSvc','Dnscache','Dhcp','EventLog','PlugPlay','Spooler','W32Time'); Write-Output 'Critical Services Status:'; Write-Output ''; foreach ($svc in $services) { $s = Get-Service $svc -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($s) { $status = if($s.Status -eq 'Running'){'✓ Running'}else{"⚠ $($s.Status)"}; Write-Output "$($s.DisplayName): $status" } }

Actions.Name: Stopped Auto-Start Services
Actions.Description: Find services that should be running
Actions.Script: Write-Output 'Auto-start services that are stopped:'; Write-Output ''; $stopped = Get-Service | Where-Object { $_.StartType -eq 'Automatic' -and $_.Status -ne 'Running' }; if ($stopped) { $stopped | Select-Object -First 10 | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "⚠ $($_.DisplayName)" } } else { Write-Output '✓ All auto-start services are running' }

Actions.Name: Restart Audio Service
Actions.Description: Fix audio problems by restarting service
Actions.Script: Write-Output 'Restarting Windows Audio...'; Restart-Service AudioSrv -Force; Restart-Service AudioEndpointBuilder -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep 2; Write-Output "Audio Service: $((Get-Service AudioSrv).Status)"; Write-Output 'Audio should be working now'

Actions.Name: Restart WMI Service
Actions.Script: Write-Output 'Restarting WMI...'; Restart-Service Winmgmt -Force; Start-Sleep 3; Write-Output "WMI Service: $((Get-Service Winmgmt).Status)"

ActionCategories.Title: System Cleanup
ActionCategories.Description: Free up disk space and clean system

Actions.Name: Run Disk Cleanup
Actions.Script: Write-Output 'Starting Disk Cleanup...'; cleanmgr /sagerun:1; Write-Output 'Disk Cleanup wizard launched'

Actions.Name: Clear Windows Temp
Actions.Script: $before = [math]::Round((Get-ChildItem 'C:\Windows\Temp' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum).Sum/1MB,1); Remove-Item 'C:\Windows\Temp\*' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $after = [math]::Round((Get-ChildItem 'C:\Windows\Temp' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum).Sum/1MB,1); Write-Output "Freed: $([math]::Round($before-$after,1)) MB from Windows Temp"

Actions.Name: Empty Recycle Bin
Actions.Script: $shell = New-Object -ComObject Shell.Application; $bin = $shell.NameSpace(10); $count = $bin.Items().Count; Clear-RecycleBin -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "Recycle Bin emptied ($count items removed)"

Actions.Name: Clear Prefetch Cache
Actions.Script: $count = (Get-ChildItem 'C:\Windows\Prefetch' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).Count; Remove-Item 'C:\Windows\Prefetch\*' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "Cleared $count prefetch files"; Write-Output 'Note: First boot after this may be slightly slower'

Actions.Name: Flush DNS & Reset Network
Actions.Script: ipconfig /flushdns; Write-Output 'DNS cache flushed'; netsh winsock reset; Write-Output 'Winsock reset'; netsh int ip reset; Write-Output 'IP stack reset'; Write-Output ''; Write-Output '⚠ Restart recommended for full effect'
